title: Illegal mix of collation on 8.0.22 and 8.0.23
description:
The query below works on 8.0.21, but throws illegal mix of collations error on 8.0.22/8.0.23:

8.0.21:
mysql> select * from mysql.user u where u.host=SUBSTRING_INDEX(CURRENT_USER(),'@',-1);
[...]
7 rows in set (0.00 sec)

8.0.22/8.0.23:
mysql>  select * from mysql.user u where u.host=SUBSTRING_INDEX(CURRENT_USER(),'@',-1);
ERROR 1267 (HY000): Illegal mix of collations (ascii_general_ci,IMPLICIT) and (utf8_general_ci,SYSCONST) for operation '='
How to repeat:
Execute the following query on 8.0.22/8.0.23:
select * from mysql.user u where u.host=SUBSTRING_INDEX(CURRENT_USER(),'@',-1);
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_collation (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8_general_ci, host VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8_general_ci);
INSERT INTO test_collation (id, name, host) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'localhost');
INSERT INTO test_collation (id, name, host) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'example.com');
SELECT * FROM test_collation WHERE host = SUBSTRING_INDEX(CURRENT_USER(), '@', -1);
key_bug_features: Illegal mix of collations in query execution
